mapper.sql: affiliation_id, code, name, display_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO affiliation (affiliation_id, code, name, display_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{affiliationId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{displayOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM affiliation WHERE affiliation_id = #{affiliationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM affiliation WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM affiliation WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY display_order NULLS LAST, affiliation_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM affiliation WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM employee WHERE affiliation_id = #{affiliationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
